OBJECT Page 21 Customer Card
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=07/25/25;
    Time=[ 2:08:15 PM];
    Version List=NAVW16.00.01,N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Customer Card;
    SourceTable=Table18;
    PageType=Card;
    RefreshOnActivate=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             DisableAppliestoDocNoEnable := TRUE;
             GlobalDimension1CodeEnableG := TRUE;
             // Start PA038224
             // Stop PA038224
             ContactEditableG := TRUE;
             // Start PA035901
             MapPointVisible := TRUE;
             // Stop PA035901
             // Start EU.0071195
             TireHotelDetailsVisibleG := UserSessionG.TireHotelLicensePermissionCheck();
             // Stop EU.0071195
           END;

    OnOpenPage=VAR
                 MapMgt@1000 : Codeunit 802;
               BEGIN
                 // Start INC
                 EnableImporterTab;
                 // Stop INC
                 // Start PA036373
                 DataPrivSetupG.RESET;
                 DataPrivSetupG.SETRANGE(Active, TRUE);
                 DataPrivSetupG.SETFILTER("Data Privacy Codeunit ID", '>0');
                 EnableDataPrivacyG := NOT DataPrivSetupG.ISEMPTY;
                 // Stop PA036373
                 // Start PA035901
                 IF NOT MapMgt.TestSetup THEN
                   MapPointVisible := FALSE;
                 // Stop PA035901
                 // Start PA038456.44408
                 RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                 UserSessionG.SetMake("Global Dimension 2 Code", RecRefG);
                 // Stop PA038456.44408
                 // Start EU.0083120
                 CheckValidVATRegNo();
                 // Stop EU.0083120
               END;

    OnClosePage=BEGIN
                  // Start PA044429
                  ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnClosePage,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
                  // Stop PA044429
                END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       RelatedVehiclesTL@1109400000 : TEMPORARY Record 5207815;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0180162.183349
                       IF FreezeNewInsertedRecordG AND ("No." > '') THEN
                         SETRECFILTER();
                       // Stop EU.0180162.183349

                       // Start PA044429
                       ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnAfterGetRecord,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'');
                       // Stop PA044429

                       ActivateFields;
                       // Start PA036373
                       // Stop PA036373
                       // Start PA032665
                       // Start PA038224
                       CheckMessageButtonEditable();
                       // Stop PA038224
                       // Stop PA032665
                       // Start PA036869
                       // Stop PA036869

                       // Start EU.0004649
                       CALCFIELDS("Address Source");
                       AddressSourceCodeG := "Address Source";
                       // Stop EU.0004649

                       // Start EU.0006288
                       CALCFIELDS("Exclude from Data Privacy");
                       ExcludeDataPrivacyG := "Exclude from Data Privacy";
                       // Stop EU.0006288
                       // Start EU.0083120
                       CheckValidVATRegNo();
                       // Stop EU.0083120
                       // Start PA044429
                       ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnAfterGetRecord,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
                       // Stop PA044429
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=VAR
                  DataTemplateHdrL@1109400001 : Record 5210218;
                  TemplateMgmtL@1119427002 : Codeunit 5210206;
                  RecRefL@1119427001 : RecordRef;
                  TemplateCodeL@1119427003 : Code[10];
                BEGIN
                  // Start INC
                  // Start PA038224
                  // Stop PA038224
                  // Stop INC
                  // Start PA035597
                  // @ The list of templates should be displayed for the user when a new record is getting created
                  // @ This feature is available only in RTC
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  AddressMgtG.OnNewCustomer(Rec);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  // Start PA041187.90242
                  // If templates exist FillDefaults is used, otherwise it is used in table Customer onInsert trigger
                  // Previously in Customer Card were populated just fields of Template, the others were empty
                  // Now are first populated default fields from Customer Setup and then are modified just existing fields in Template
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  DataTemplateHdrL.SETRANGE(TableID, DATABASE::Customer);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  IF DataTemplateHdrL.FINDFIRST THEN
                    FillDefaults();
                  // Stop PA041187.90242
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  RecRefL.OPEN(DATABASE::Customer);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                  TemplateCodeL := TemplateMgmtL.ApplyTemplate(RecRefL);
                  RecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
                  "Template Code" := TemplateCodeL;
                  // Stop PA035597
                  // Start EU.0180162.183349
                  FreezeNewInsertedRecordG := TRUE;
                  // Stop EU.0180162.183349
                END;

    OnModifyRecord=VAR
                     LastNamePageL@1109400000 : Page 5025369;
                   BEGIN
                     // Start PA044774
                     ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnModify,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'');
                     // Stop PA044774


                     // Start INC
                     IF "Last Name" = '' THEN BEGIN
                       LastNamePageL.Customer(Rec);
                       LastNamePageL.LOOKUPMODE(TRUE);
                     // Start PA043734
                       IF LastNamePageL.RUNMODAL = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                     // Start EU.0040227
                         MODIFY;
                         xRec.GET("No.");
                     // Stop EU.0040227
                         VALIDATE("First Name", LastNamePageL.GetFirstName());
                         VALIDATE("Last Name", LastNamePageL.GetLastName());
                       END;
                     // Stop PA043734
                     END;
                     CreateAddress(TRUE);

                     // Start PA044774
                     ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnModify,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
                     // Stop PA044774
                     EXIT(TRUE);
                     // Stop INC
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start INC
                     "Action triggered by Card Page" := TRUE;
                     // Stop INC
                   END;

    OnQueryClosePage=BEGIN
                       // Start PA044429
                       ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnAction,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'');
                                                           // Stop PA044429

                       // Start EU.0006288
                       // Start EU.0026544
                       IF NOT GDPRAnonymizationLogEntryG.ContactIsFullyAnonymized(GetContact("No.")) THEN
                       // Stop Eu.0026544
                         IF CloseAction IN [ACTION::OK, ACTION::LookupOK] THEN
                           DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckQuery, TRUE, DATABASE::Customer, "No.", TRUE);
                       // Stop EU.0006288

                       // Start PA044429
                       ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnAction,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
                       // Stop PA044429
                     END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=BEGIN
                           // Start PA038456.44408
                           RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                           UserSessionG.SetMake("Global Dimension 2 Code", RecRefG);
                           CurrPage.SpecialFunctionFactBox.PAGE.Refresh("Global Dimension 2 Code");
                           // Stop PA038456.44408
                           // Start PA041187.89458
                           // Start EU.0200720.203027
                           FirstNameEditableG := AddressMgtG.EditFirstName(AddressMgtG.IsBusiness("Address Salutation Code"), "First Name", "Last Name", "Search Name");
                           // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                           // Stop PA041187.89458
                         END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000003;  ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 1109400001;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=General }
      { 1109400002;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Customer Cash Registers;
                      RunObject=Page 5208350;
                      RunPageLink=Source No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Image=CashReceiptJournal;
                      RunPageMode=Edit }
      { 1109400004;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Parts }
      { 1109400008;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Parts Sales Quote;
                      Image=Quote;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 // Start PA041187.88726
                                 CreatePartsSalesDocument(DocTypeG::Quote, "No.", '');
                                 // Start PA041187.88726
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400006;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Parts Sales Order;
                      Image=Document;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 // Start PA041187.88726
                                 CreatePartsSalesDocument(DocTypeG::Order, "No.", '');
                                 // Stop PA041187.88726
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400011;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Vehicles }
      { 1109400013;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Vehicle Sales Quote;
                      Image=Document;
                      RunPageMode=Create;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 VehicleCollectionUnitG.CreateVehicleSalesDocument(DocTypeG::Quote, "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400012;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Vehicle Sales Order;
                      Image=Document;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 VehicleCollectionUnitG.CreateVehicleSalesDocument(DocTypeG::Order, "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400016;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Service }
      { 1109400021;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Service &Quote;
                      Image=Quote;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 ServMgmtG.CreateServDocfromCustInterface(ServDocTypeG::Quote, "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400022;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Scheduling Order;
                      Image=WorkCenterLoad;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 ServMgmtG.CreateServDocfromCustInterface(ServDocTypeG::Scheduling, "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400020;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Service &Order;
                      Image=Document;
                      RunPageMode=Create;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 ServMgmtG.CreateServDocfromCustInterface(ServDocTypeG::Order, "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400009;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Customer }
      { 1109400010;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Bank Accounts;
                      RunObject=Page 423;
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Image=NewBank }
      { 1109400014;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to &Addresses;
                      Description=EU.0000048;
                      RunObject=Page 301;
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Image=AddToHome }
      { 243     ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Document Layouts;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Document Layouts;
                      ToolTipML=ENU=Set up a layout for different types of documents such as invoices, quotes, and credit memos.;
                      Description=EU.0101361;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=Quote;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      PromotedOnly=Yes;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 CustomReportSelection@1000 : Record 9657;
                               BEGIN
                                 CustomReportSelection.SETRANGE("Source Type", DATABASE::Customer);
                                 CustomReportSelection.SETRANGE("Source No.", "No.");
                                 PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Customer Report Selections", CustomReportSelection);
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400043;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=New Document;
                      Visible=FALSE }
      { 1109400042;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Special &Functions;
                      Description=PA033895,PA036549.33440;
                      Image=ImportExport;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 RecordReferenceL@1101221269 : RecordRef;
                                 PageSpecialFunctionsL@1101221268 : Page 5206814;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start PA033895
                                 // Start PA036867
                                 CLEAR(RecordReferenceL);
                                 // Stop PA036867
                                 RecordReferenceL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                                 // Start PA036867
                                 CLEAR(PageSpecialFunctionsL);
                                 // Stop PA036867
                                 // Start PA035597
                                 PageSpecialFunctionsL.SetParameters(PAGE::"Customer Card", RecordReferenceL, '', '');
                                 // Stop PA035597
                                 PageSpecialFunctionsL.RUNMODAL;
                                 // Stop PA033895
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400041;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=New Quick Customer;
                      Description=PA032651,EU.0200720.199642;
                      RunObject=Page 5206880;
                      Image=AddAction;
                      RunPageMode=Create }
      { 1109400040;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=New Quick Item Inquiry;
                      Description=PA032651,EU.0200720.199642;
                      RunObject=Page 5205322;
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=AddAction;
                      RunPageMode=Create }
      { 1109400039;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=New Quick Vehicle;
                      Description=PA032651,EU.0200720.199642;
                      RunObject=Page 5205881;
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=AddAction;
                      RunPageMode=Create }
      { 1109400038;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Vehicle Sales Invoice;
                      Image=Invoice;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 VehicleCollectionUnitG.CreateVehicleSalesDocument(DocTypeG::Invoice, "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400037;2 ;Action    ;

                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400036;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Vehicle Sales Credit Memo;
                      Image=CreditMemo;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 VehicleCollectionUnitG.CreateVehicleSalesDocument(DocTypeG::"Credit Memo", "No.", FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400035;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Service Credit Memo;
                      Image=CreditMemo;
                      OnAction=BEGIN

                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400034;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Parts Sales Invoice;
                      Image=Invoice;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 // Start PA041187.88726
                                 CreatePartsSalesDocument(DocTypeG::Invoice, "No.", '');
                                 // Stop PA041187.88726
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400033;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Parts Sales Return Order;
                      Image=ReturnOrder;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 // Start PA041187.88726
                                 CreatePartsSalesDocument(DocTypeG::"Return Order", "No.", '');
                                 // Stop PA041187.88726
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400032;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Parts Sales Credit Memo;
                      Image=CreditMemo;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032473
                                 // Start PA041187.88726
                                 CreatePartsSalesDocument(DocTypeG::"Credit Memo", "No.", '');
                                 // Stop PA041187.88726
                                 // Stop PA032473
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400031;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Cash Register Customer;
                      Description=PA034252.I000071;
                      Image=CashReceiptJournal;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA034252.I000071
                                 CashRegisterFunctionsG.CreateCustVendCashRegister("No.", TRUE);
                                 // Stop PA034252.I000071
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400055;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Functions }
      { 1109400058;2 ;Action    ;
                      Name=Contact / Vehicle Search;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Contact / Vehicle Search;
                      Description=PA042814;
                      RunObject=Page 5205917;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Find;
                      PromotedCategory=Process }
      { 1109400054;2 ;Action    ;
                      Name=Vehicle Locator;
                      ShortCutKey=Ctrl+Q;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Vehicle Locator;
                      Description=PA038126.50429,PA042814;
                      Image=FindCreditMemo;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA038126
                                 AddressLnkG.RESET;
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG."Address No.", Rec."Address No.");
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG.Type, AddressLnkG.Type::Contact);
                                 IF AddressLnkG.FINDFIRST THEN
                                   ContactG.GET(AddressLnkG."No.");
                                 CLEAR(VehicleSearchG);
                                 VehicleSearchG.SetCutomerContactInfo("No.", ContactG."No.");
                                 VehicleSearchG.RUNMODAL;
                                 // Stop PA038126
                               END;
                                }
      { 1055600 ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Tire Hotel Order;
                      AccessByPermission=Codeunit 5208840=X;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Tire Hotel Order;
                      Description=EU.0000046;
                      Image=SpecialOrder;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 THOrderListPageL@1055601 : Page 5208847;
                                 THMngtCuL@1055600 : Codeunit 5208840;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0000046
                                 THMngtCuL.OpenOrderListPage(THOrderListPageL, '', "No.");
                                 // Stop EU.0000046
                               END;
                                }
      { 1900000004;  ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=RelatedInformation }
      { 1109400091;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Customer }
      { 1109400090;2 ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+Ctrl+D;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Dimensions;
                      Description=PA035597;
                      RunObject=Page 540;
                      RunPageLink=Table ID=CONST(18),
                                  No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Dimensions }
      { 1109400056;2 ;Action    ;
                      Name=<Page SEPA Direct Debit Mandates>;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Direct Debit Mandates;
                      Description=PA036549.33440;
                      RunObject=Page 1230;
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=MakeAgreement }
      { 1109400085;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Co&ntact;
                      ToolTipML=ENU=Contact for the Customer;
                      Description=INC,PA036549.33440,EU.0200720.199642;
                      Image=ExportSalesPerson;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 ContactL@19853700 : Record 5050;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0200720.199642
                                 TESTFIELD("Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.RESET;
                                 CurrContactG.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
                                 IF CurrContactG.COUNT > 1 THEN
                                   PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, CurrContactG)
                                 ELSE
                                   PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Contact Card", CurrContactG);
                                 // Stop EU.0200720.199642
                               END;
                                }
      { 19853700;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Contact &Persons;
                      ToolTipML=ENU=Persons which have a relation to the Contact. (I.e. employees who work for the Contact.);
                      Enabled=EnableContactPersonG;
                      Image=TeamSales;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0200720.199642
                                 TESTFIELD("Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.RESET;
                                 CurrContactG.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
                                 IF CurrContactG.COUNT = 1 THEN BEGIN
                                   CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;
                                   CurrContactG.RESET;
                                   CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Company No.", CurrContactG."No.");
                                   CurrContactG.SETRANGE(Type, CurrContactG.Type::Person);
                                   IF CurrContactG.COUNT > 1 THEN
                                     PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Contact Person List", CurrContactG)
                                   ELSE BEGIN
                                     CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;
                                     PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Contact Person Card", CurrContactG);
                                   END;
                                 END;
                                 // Stop EU.0200720.199642
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400089;2 ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Ctrl+F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Ledger E&ntries;
                      Description=Defect8582610;
                      RunObject=Page 25;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Customer No.,Posting Date,Currency Code);
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Image=MaintenanceLedgerEntries }
      { 1109400088;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Co&mments;
                      RunObject=Page 124;
                      RunPageLink=Table Name=CONST(Customer),

                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=ViewComments }

                                 // Start PA035901

      { 1109400084;2 ;Separator  }
      { 1109400083;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Send Message;
                      Description=PA036549.33440,PA038224;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Enabled=EnableMessageG;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=SendTo;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032665
                                 // Start PA038224
                                 CLEAR(MessageMgmtG);
                                 MessageMgmtG.OpenSendMessagePage(
                                   MessageListG.Area::CRM,
                                 // Start EU.0032067

                                   "No.",
                                   MessageListG."Sender/Recipient Type"::Person,
                                   FALSE,
                                   "Message Notification",
                                   "Message Type",
                                 // Start PA038224.47832
                                 // Start EU.0129713.132441
                                   "Message Notification App Type",
                                   FALSE);
                                 // Start EU.0129713.132441
                                 // Stop PA038224.47832
                                 // Stop PA038224
                                 // Stop PA032665
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400082;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Message List;
                      Description=PA038224;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Enabled=EnableMessageG;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=List;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032665
                                 // Start PA038224
                                 MessageMgmtG.ShowSentMessageGeneral(MessageListG."Sender/Recipient Type"::Person, "No.");
                                 // Stop PA038224
                                 // Stop PA032665
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400081;2 ;Separator  }
      { 1109400080;2 ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Statistics;
                      Description=PA036549.33440;
                      RunObject=Page 151;

                                  Date Filter=FIELD(Date Filter),

                      Image=Statistics }

                      CaptionML=ENU=Statistics by C&urrencies;
                      RunObject=Page 481;

                                  Global Dimension 1 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 1 Filter),
                                  Global Dimension 2 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 2 Filter),
                                  Date Filter=FIELD(Date Filter);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Statistics }
      { 1109400078;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Entr&y Statistics;
                      RunObject=Page 302;
                      RunPageLink=No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Date Filter=FIELD(Date Filter),
                                  Global Dimension 1 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 1 Filter),
                                  Global Dimension 2 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 2 Filter);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Statistics }
      { 1109400076;2 ;Separator  }
      { 1109400074;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Driver's Lice&nces;
                      RunObject=Page 5029075;
                      RunPageLink=Address No.=FIELD(Address No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Agreement }
      { 1109400049;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Remarks;
                      RunObject=Page 5025403;
                      RunPageLink=Table Name=CONST(Customer),
                                  No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Alerts }
      { 1109400048;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Cust&omer Instructions;
                      RunObject=Page 5045302;
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Note }
      { 1109400047;2 ;Separator  }
      { 1109400046;2 ;Action    ;
                      Name=DPQuery;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Data Privacy &Query;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Enabled=EnableDataPrivacyG;
                      Image=CarryOutActionMessage;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA036373
                                 DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(
                                   DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckQuery,
                                   FALSE,
                                   DATABASE::Customer,
                                   "No.",
                                   FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA036373
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400045;2 ;Action    ;
                      Name=DPQueryLog;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Data Privac&y Log File;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Enabled=EnableDataPrivacyG;
                      Image=Track;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA036373
                                 DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(
                                   DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckLog,
                                   FALSE,
                                   DATABASE::Customer,
                                   "No.",
                                   FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA036373
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400044;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Preferred Ways of Contact;
                      Description=PA033305;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA033305
                                 PrefWayOfContactG.DrilldownPrefWayOfContact(GetContact("No."), "No.");
                                 CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA033305
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400019;2 ;Separator  }
      { 1109400018;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Installment &Terms;
                      RunObject=Page 5025364;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Customer No.,Valid-From Date);
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=ChangeDates }
      { 1109400017;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Installments;
                      RunObject=Page 5025353;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Customer No.);
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=AmountByPeriod }
      { 1109400050;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Vehicles }
      { 1109400051;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Ve&hicles;
                      RunObject=Page 5025404;
                      RunPageLink=Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Image=LinkWithExisting }
      { 1101382983;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Model/Vehicles of Interest;
                      Image=ResourceLedger;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 ModelVehofInterestL@1101382983 : Record 5207809;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start PA036869
                                 ModelVehofInterestL.RESET;
                                 ModelVehofInterestL.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
                                 ModelVehofInterestL.FILTERGROUP(2);
                                 ModelVehofInterestL.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
                                 ModelVehofInterestL.FILTERGROUP(0);
                                 PAGE.RUN(0, ModelVehofInterestL);
                                 // Stop PA036869
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400057;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Related Vehicles;
                      Image=ResourceLedger;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 RelatedVehiclesL@1101382983 : Page 5207815;
                                 RelatedVehiclesTL@1109400000 : TEMPORARY Record 5207815;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start PA041856
                                 CLEAR(RelatedVehiclesL);
                                 RelatedVehiclesL.SetAddressNo("Address No.");
                                 RelatedVehiclesL.PrepareRecords(RelatedVehiclesTL);
                                 PAGE.RUN(PAGE::"Related Vehicles", RelatedVehiclesTL);
                                 // Stop PA041856
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400030;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=S&ales }
      { 1109400052;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=S&ales;
                      RunObject=Page 155;
                      RunPageLink=No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Global Dimension 1 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 1 Filter),
                                  Global Dimension 2 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 2 Filter);
                      Image=Statistics;
                      PromotedCategory=Process }
      { 1109400029;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Invoice &Discounts;
                      RunObject=Page 23;
                      RunPageLink=Code=FIELD(Invoice Disc. Code);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=ActivateDiscounts }
      { 1109400028;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Quotes;
                      RunObject=Page 41;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Document Type,Sell-to Customer No.,No.);
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Quote }
      { 1109400027;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Blanket Orders;
                      RunObject=Page 507;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Document Type,Sell-to Customer No.,No.);
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=BlanketOrder }
      { 1109400026;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Orders;
                      RunObject=Page 42;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Document Type,Sell-to Customer No.,No.);
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to Customer No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Document }
      { 1109400025;2 ;Separator  }
      { 1109400024;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Where-Used;
                      Description=PA036542;
                      Image=Where-Used;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 TrackDocsL@1109400001 : Page 5028668;
                               BEGIN
                                 TrackDocsL.SetCustomer(Rec);
                                 // Start INC
                                 TrackDocsL.SetName(Rec.Name);
                                 TrackDocsL.SetShowDocFilter(ShowDocFilterG::Customer);
                                 AddressLnkG.RESET;
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG."Address No.", Rec."Address No.");
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG.Type, AddressLnkG.Type::Vendor);
                                 IF AddressLnkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                                   VendG."No." := AddressLnkG."No.";
                                   VendG.GET(VendG."No.");
                                   TrackDocsL.SetVendor(VendG);
                                 END ELSE
                                   TrackDocsL.ClearVendor;

                                 AddressLnkG.RESET;
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG."Address No.", Rec."Address No.");
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG.Type, AddressLnkG.Type::Contact);
                                 IF AddressLnkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                                   ContactG."No." := AddressLnkG."No.";
                                   ContactG.GET(ContactG."No.");
                                   TrackDocsL.SetContact(ContactG);
                                 END ELSE
                                   TrackDocsL.ClearContact;

                                 // Stop INC
                                 TrackDocsL.RUN;
                                 CLEAR(TrackDocsL);
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400060;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Parts Legacy History;
                      Description=PA041681,PA041187.90998;
                      RunObject=Page 5210181;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Sell-to/Buy-from No.,VIN,Order No.,Document No.)
                                  WHERE(Main Area=FILTER(Parts Sales));
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to/Buy-from No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=History }
      { 1109400059;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Vehicle Legacy History;
                      Description=PA041681,PA041187.90998;
                      RunObject=Page 5210185;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Sell-to/Buy-from No.,VIN,Order No.,Document No.)
                                  WHERE(Main Area=CONST(Vehicle Sales));
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to/Buy-from No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=History }
      { 1109400023;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Service Legacy History;
                      Description=PA041681,PA041187.90998;
                      RunObject=Page 5210187;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Sell-to/Buy-from No.,VIN,Order No.,Document No.)
                                  WHERE(Main Area=CONST(Service Sales));
                      RunPageLink=Sell-to/Buy-from No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=History }
    }
  }
  CONTROLS
  {
    { 1900000001;0;Container;
                ContainerType=ContentArea }

    { 1   ;1   ;Group     ;
                CaptionML=ENU=General }

    { 2   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="No.";
                Importance=Promoted;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start EU.0132549.132759
                             TESTFIELD("No.");
                             IF ("No." <> xRec."No.") AND (GETFILTER("No.") > '') THEN
                               SETRANGE("No.");
                             // Stop EU.0132549.132759
                           END;

                OnAssistEdit=BEGIN
                               IF AssistEdit(xRec) THEN
                                 CurrPage.UPDATE;
                             END;
                              }

    { 4   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Address Salutation Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD';
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA041187.89458
                             // Start EU.0200720.203027
                             FirstNameEditableG := AddressMgtG.EditFirstName(AddressMgtG.IsBusiness("Address Salutation Code"), "First Name", "Last Name", "Search Name");
                             // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                             // Stop PA041187.89458
                           END;
                            }

    { 133 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Title Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD';
                Importance=Additional;
                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 129 ;2   ;Field     ;
                Description=PA041187.89458;
                SourceExpr="First Name";
                Importance=Promoted;
                Editable=FirstNameEditableG }

    { 127 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Last Name";
                Importance=Promoted;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start EU.0004649
                             IF "Last Name" <> xRec."Last Name" THEN BEGIN
                               CALCFIELDS("Address Source");
                               AddressSourceCodeG := "Address Source";
                             END;
                             // Stop EU.0004649
                           END;
                            }

    { 138 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Name 2";
                Importance=Additional;
                QuickEntry=FALSE }

                SourceExpr=Address }

    { 20  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Balance (LCY)";
                Visible=FALSE;
                OnDrillDown=VAR
                              DtldCustLedgEntry@1001 : Record 379;
                              CustLedgEntry@1002 : Record 21;
                            BEGIN
                              DtldCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
                              COPYFILTER("Global Dimension 1 Filter", DtldCustLedgEntry."Initial Entry Global Dim. 1");
                              COPYFILTER("Global Dimension 2 Filter", DtldCustLedgEntry."Initial Entry Global Dim. 2");
                              COPYFILTER("Currency Filter", DtldCustLedgEntry."Currency Code");
                              CustLedgEntry.DrillDownOnEntries(DtldCustLedgEntry);
                            END;
                             }

                SourceExpr="Sales (LCY)";
                Visible=FALSE }

    { 1109400005;2;Field  ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Message Notification;
                Description=PA038224;
                SourceExpr="Message Notification";
                Importance=Additional;
                Editable=TRUE;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA038224
                             // Start PA040256.60880
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA040256.60880
                             // Start PA038224.47832
                             SetMessageNotification(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA038224.47832
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             CheckMessageButtonEditable();
                             // Stop PA038224
                           END;

                OnLookup=BEGIN
                           // Start PA040256.60880
                           CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                           // Stop PA040256.60880
                           // Start PA038224
                           // Start PA038224.47832
                           // Start EU.0046364
                           // Start EU.0122714.123625
                           IF NOT SetMessageNotification(FALSE) THEN BEGIN
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             EXIT(FALSE);
                           END;
                           // Stop EU.0122714.123625
                           // Stop EU.0046364
                           // Stop PA038224.47832
                           // Start PA038224.47253
                           CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                           CheckMessageButtonEditable();
                           // Stop PA038224.47253
                           // Stop PA038224
                         END;

                OnDrillDown=VAR
                              SelectedMultipleChannelL@1109400000 : Record 5207890;
                              ContactL@1109400001 : Record 5050;
                            BEGIN
                              // Start EU.0032067
                              ContactL.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
                              ContactL.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
                              ContactL.SETRANGE(Type, ContactL.Type::Company);
                              // Start EU.0046364
                              ContactL.FINDFIRST;
                              SelectedMultipleChannelL.ShowSelectedChannels('', SelectedMultipleChannelL."Source Type"::Master, SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::CRM, ContactL."No.");
                              // Stop EU.0046364
                              // Stop EU.0032067
                            END;

                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 150 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Home Page 2";
                Importance=Additional;
                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 1101314647;2;Field  ;
                CaptionML=ENU=No. of Preferred Ways of Contact;
                SourceExpr=PrefWayOfContactG.CountPrefWayOfContact(GetContact("No."),"No.");
                Importance=Additional;
                Editable=FALSE;
                OnDrillDown=BEGIN
                              // Start PA033305.I000822
                              CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
                              COMMIT;
                              // Stop PA033305.I000822
                              // Start PA033305
                              PrefWayOfContactG.DrilldownPrefWayOfContact(GetContact("No."), "No.");
                              CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                              // Stop PA033305
                            END;

                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 1143;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Block Payment Tolerance";
                Visible=FALSE;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             IF "Block Payment Tolerance" THEN BEGIN
                               IF CONFIRM(Text002, FALSE) THEN
                                 PaymentToleranceMgtG.DelTolCustLedgEntry(Rec);
                             END ELSE BEGIN
                               IF CONFIRM(Text001, FALSE) THEN
                                 PaymentToleranceMgtG.CalcTolCustLedgEntry(Rec);
                             END;
                           END;
                            }

                Importance=Promoted }

    { 66  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Language Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD' }

    { 68  ;2   ;Field     ;
                Description=EU.0083120;
                SourceExpr="VAT Registration No.";
                Style=Favorable;
                StyleExpr=VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start EU.0083120
                             CheckValidVATRegNo();
                             // Stop EU.0083120
                           END;

                OnAssistEdit=VAR
                               VATRegistrationLogMgt@72000 : Codeunit 249;
                             BEGIN
                               VATRegistrationLogMgt.AssistEditCustomerVATReg(Rec);
                             END;
                              }

    { 1119432005;2;Field  ;
                Description=INC;
                SourceExpr="EU Business Customer" }

    { 1905866701;1;Group  ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Free;
                Visible=FALSE }

    { 93  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Date 1" }

    { 154 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Date 2" }

    { 156 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Extra Code 1" }

    { 160 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Extra Code 2" }

    { 162 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Extra Code 3" }

    { 164 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Text 1" }

    { 166 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Text 2" }

    { 168 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Text 3" }

    { 170 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Text 4" }

    { 172 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Text 5" }

    { 174 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Text 6" }

    { 1901004601;1;Group  ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Importer;
                Visible=FALSE }

    { 1101353002;2;Field  ;
                SourceExpr="Disable Applies-to Doc. No.";
                Enabled=DisableAppliestoDocNoEnable }

    { 1900000007;0;Container;
                ContainerType=FactBoxArea }

    { 1170000000;1;Part   ;
                Name=SpecialFunctionFactBox;
                CaptionML=ENU=Special &Functions;
                Description=PA038456,PA039901;
                SubPageLink=Source Table ID=CONST(18),
                            Source Page=CONST(21),
                            Code 1=FIELD(No.);
                PagePartID=Page5206800;
                PartType=Page }

    { 1903223507;1;Part   ;

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      Mail@1000 : Codeunit 397;
      MapPointVisible@19022708 : Boolean INDATASET;
      Text001@1119432303 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to allow payment tolerance for entries that are currently open?';
      Text002@1119432302 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to remove payment tolerance from entries that are currently open?';
      _INCADEA_@1109400001 : Boolean;
      __START_EXIT_POINT___@1109400019 : Integer;
      ExitPointSetupG@1109400018 : Record 5207300;
      ExitPointParamG@1109400017 : TEMPORARY Record 5207301;
      ExitPointUnitG@1109400016 : Codeunit 5207300;
      EPRecRef2G@1109400014 : RecordRef;
      __STOP_EXIT_POINT___@1109400010 : Integer;
      CompanyInfoG@1101342645 : Record 79;
      DataPrivSetupG@1101342644 : Record 5060978;
      DepositItemG@1109400002 : Record 27;
      GDPRAnonymizationLogEntryG@1055600 : Record 5046873;
      ContactG@1109400006 : Record 5050;
      CurrContactG@19853700 : Record 5050;
      AddressLnkG@1109400005 : Record 5029112;
      VendG@1109400004 : Record 23;
      MessageListG@1109400015 : Record 5047002;
      PrefWayOfContactG@1101314645 : Record 5060975;
      VehicleSearchG@1109400000 : Page 5205930;
      DataPrivManagementG@1101342643 : Codeunit 5060978;
      PaymentToleranceMgtG@1109400013 : Codeunit 426;
      ServMgmtG@1119432001 : Codeunit 5025614;
      VehicleCollectionUnitG@1119432003 : Codeunit 5025409;
      MessageMgmtG@1109400012 : Codeunit 5047001;
      CashRegisterFunctionsG@1101314646 : Codeunit 5028760;
      UserSessionG@1000000001 : Codeunit 5028665;
      AddressMgtG@1109400009 : Codeunit 5029101;
      InternatDataPrivacyCheckG@628801 : Codeunit 5060971;
      ServDocTypeG@1119432004 : 'Quote,Order,,,,,,Scheduling';
      DocTypeG@1119432002 : 'Quote,Order,Invoice,Credit Memo,Blanket Order,Return Order';
      ShowDocFilterG@1109400003 : 'All,Contact,Customer,Vendor';
      EnableDataPrivacyG@1109400011 : Boolean INDATASET;
      EnableMessageG@1109400007 : Boolean INDATASET;
      ContactEditableG@19051436 : Boolean INDATASET;
      GlobalDimension1CodeEnableG@19057401 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DisableAppliestoDocNoEnable@19051836 : Boolean INDATASET;
      FirstNameEditableG@1109400008 : Boolean;
      RecRefG@1000000000 : RecordRef;
      AddressSourceCodeG@464900 : Code[10];
      ExcludeDataPrivacyG@628800 : Boolean;
      VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG@8312000 : Boolean;
      TireHotelDetailsVisibleG@7119500 : Boolean;
      FreezeNewInsertedRecordG@18016200 : Boolean;
      EnableContactPersonG@19853702 : Boolean;

    PROCEDURE ActivateFields@3();
    BEGIN
      ContactEditableG := "Primary Contact No." = '';
      // Start EU.0006288
      EnableDataPrivacy();
      // Stop EU.0006288
      // Start EU.0200720.199642
      CurrContactG.RESET;
      CurrContactG.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
      IF ("Address No." <> 0) AND (CurrContactG.COUNT = 1) THEN BEGIN
        CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;
        CurrContactG.RESET;
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Company No.", CurrContactG."No.");
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE(Type, CurrContactG.Type::Person);
        EnableContactPersonG := NOT CurrContactG.ISEMPTY;
      END ELSE
        EnableContactPersonG := FALSE
      // Stop EU.0200720.199642
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@1101353000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EXITPOINT__@5025300();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPointCall@5025380(MakeCodeP@1109400003 : Code[20];TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50];VAR EPRecRefP@1109400005 : RecordRef) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ param MakeCodeP - Code 20
      // @ param TriggerP - Integer
      // @ param TypeP - Integer
      // @ param ExitPointIDP - Text 50
      // @ param EPRecRefP - RecordRef ByVAR

      // Start PA044429
      EXIT(ExitPointUnitG.RunExitPoint(
        ExitPointSetupG."Object Type"::Page,
        PAGE::"Customer Card",
        MakeCodeP, TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefP, EPRecRef2G, ExitPointParamG));
      // Stop PA044429
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPoint@5025450(TriggerP@1119452001 : Integer;TypeP@1119432000 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1119432001 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ param TriggerP - Integer
      // @ param TypeP - Integer
      // @ param ExitPointIDP - Text 50

      // Start PA044429
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(xRec);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall("Global Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA044429
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EXITPOINT__@5025451();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableImporterTab@1101353001();
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF NOT CompanyInfoG.IMSCheck() THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA037425
      // Stop PA037425
        DisableAppliestoDocNoEnable := FALSE;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckMessageButtonEditable@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032665
      // Start PA038224
      CLEAR(MessageMgmtG);
      // @ EnableSMSG variable is also used in Pages to control the Action Create Message
      EnableMessageG := MessageMgmtG.AllowSendMessage("No.", MessageListG."Sender/Recipient Type"::Person);
      // Stop PA038224
      // Stop PA032665
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ICPartnerCodeOnAfterValidate@19032922();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableDataPrivacy@628800();
    BEGIN
      // @ this function enables Data Privacy Actions
      // Start EU.0006288
      IF NOT InternatDataPrivacyCheckG.CheckIncludeBusinessContacts("Customer Type") THEN
        EnableDataPrivacyG := FALSE
      ELSE BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS("Exclude from Data Privacy");
        EnableDataPrivacyG := NOT "Exclude from Data Privacy";
      END;
      // Stop EU.0006288
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CheckValidVATRegNo@8312000();
    VAR
      VATRegistrationLogL@8312000 : Record 249;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0083120
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("Account No.", "No.");
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("Country/Region Code", "Country/Region Code");
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE(Status, VATRegistrationLogL.Status::Valid);
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("VAT Registration No.", "VAT Registration No.");
      IF VATRegistrationLogL.FINDFIRST THEN
        VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG := TRUE
      ELSE
        VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0083120
    END;

    BEGIN

      // @ Area PartsSales, VehicleSales, Service

}
